spells.name: Light
spells.description: A held object glows like a candle.

spells.name: Magic Dart
spells.description: A bolt of raw magic strikes a target.

spells.name: Gust
spells.description: A sudden gust extinguishes candles and pushes lighter objects.

spells.name: Warmth
spells.description: The target is comfortably warm regardless of weather.

spells.name: Fireball
spells.description: A ball of flame explodes at the target point.

spells.name: Crown of Fire
spells.description: Your head is wreathed in flame. +1 SL on Intimidate; melee attackers take damage.

spells.name: Cauterise
spells.description: A bleeding wound is sealed. Removes Bleeding condition; deals 1 damage.

spells.name: Dazzling Blaze
spells.description: A blinding flash. Targets failing a Cool test gain Blinded 1.

spells.name: Wall of Fire
spells.description: A wall of flame WPB×2 yards long springs up. Anyone crossing takes damage.

spells.name: Burning Blood
spells.description: The target's blood boils. Devastating but slow to cast.

spells.name: Beacon of Light
spells.description: You shine like a beacon; +1 SL on social tests vs daemons/undead, who must pass Cool to attack you.

spells.name: Bolt of Light
spells.description: A shaft of light skewers the target. Doubles damage against daemons and undead.

spells.name: Witch's Ward
spells.description: Target gains +20 to resist hostile magic and gains 2 magic AP.

spells.name: Purifying Light
spells.description: Cures 1 disease and removes 1 Corruption point from the target.

spells.name: Pha's Protection
spells.description: Target is concealed in shimmering haze; first attack against them suffers −20.

spells.name: Drain Life
spells.description: The target ages a year; you heal SL wounds. Living targets only.

spells.name: Pall of Darkness
spells.description: A choking dark mist. Everyone in it suffers −20 to sight-based tests.

spells.name: Spirit's Eye
spells.description: See spirits, undead, and recent paths of the dead.

spells.name: Shroud of Shyish
spells.description: You appear dead. Undead and most beasts ignore you unless attacked.

spells.name: Summon Shade
spells.description: A wraithy servant manifests; obeys simple commands. Resilient to physical damage.

spells.name: Mend
spells.description: Restore SL wounds to a living target. Cannot exceed maximum wounds.

spells.name: Cleansing Touch
spells.description: Removes 1 disease and 1 Bleeding stack from the target.

spells.name: Thorny Hide
spells.description: Target sprouts brambles; melee attackers take 1 damage per hit and risk Bleeding.

rows.effect: Snap! A loud bang; one round of ringing ears (Surprised 1).
Smoke billows from the caster; Stunned 1.
A sigil burns onto the caster's skin; 1 damage, ignoring armour.
Aethyric backlash: caster suffers 1 stack of Fatigued.
Reality wobbles; caster gains 1 Corruption point.
A small fire breaks out in 3-yard radius; everyone in it: Burning condition stack.
Aethyric vortex; caster takes SB+2 damage and gains Stunned 1.
Wraith eyes! The caster sees the dead until end of scene.
Daemon stirs — caster gains 1 Corruption + a Disorder roll (off-screen).
